note: v315: Fix sign-in hanging when 2FA is on. The post-login handler ran inside Supabase's auth-state callback while its internal lock was held and awaited the MFA assurance-level check — which needs that same lock — so it deadlocked: sign-in sat forever, and after entering the authenticator code the app stayed on the loading screen. The handler now defers its work until the lock is released, so both password sign-in and the 2FA code step complete normally.
